extract: Dragon Pulse redirects here. For the energy from White—Victini and Zekrom and Black—Victini and Reshiram known as "Dragon Pulse" in Japanese, see Dragon Force. Dragon Pulse (Japanese: りゅうのはどう Dragon Pulse) is a damage-dealing Dragon-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM59 in Generation IV and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM34 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR62 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM115 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM075 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
